signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly price surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][2].

signals.raw:
Polymarket Study Reveals 'Informed' Traders Netted $143M Since 2024 | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A new Columbia Law School and University of Haifa study, published this month, analyzed over 210,000 suspicious Polymarket trades from 2024-2026, estimating $143M profits for "informed" accounts like Ricosuave666—likely fueling X discussions on whale moves and insider tips.[1]

signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Surge with $9M Volume | NO | MED confidence**  
Active Polymarket Tweet Markets show "Elon Musk # tweets April 2026?" as top volume at $9M, with 28% odds on 1120-1159 tweets (April 17-24 bin highlighted); 130+ related markets total $21M+ volume, including Kanye tweet bets—X chatter likely tracks mispriced odds or whale shifts in real-time.[2][3]
